creator: dvl@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to takefu from comment #0)

I'm sorry, I did not know about this PR when I created the port.

See https://www.freshports.org/devel/py-versioningit/

With BSDCan this week, my time is devoted to that. If there are things missed from the port I created, please let me know and I'll see what I can do in the interim. For now, my time is limited.
